changelog:
- Lose 1 heart on death
- Gain 1 heart by killing another player
- Reach 0 hearts (configurable minimum) to trigger permanent ban
- Configurable starting hearts, max hearts, and min hearts via config file
- Heart counts persist across server restarts (per-player NBT files)
- Max health is updated in real-time to reflect current heart count
- Broadcast message on permadeath ban
